plugins.name: socratic
plugins.description: The Socratic-Feynman method as a Claude Code plugin. Ask sharp Socratic questions to find the gaps (Paul/Elder × quality-axes critic, candidate-answer drafting). Synthesize plainly (Feynman §0: SCQA paragraphs with Toulmin warrants and verification-tag inheritance) to verify understanding. /socratic:ask grills the user; /socratic:think self-grills with one user review checkpoint.
